host.description: IP or hostname for the Nut Client.

port.description: The port for the Nut Client.

username.description: Username to use for Nut Client authentication.

password.description: Password to use for Nut Client authentication.

low_batt_threshold.description: The battery level percentage at which to set the Low Battery Status to true.

poll_interval.description: The UPS polling interval in seconds.

connect_interval.description: The NUT client connection attempt interval in seconds.
